ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was recorded */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of energy traded */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price reached during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price reached during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price for the day */,
  "settlement_price" REAL /* Settlement price for the day */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "energy_type" TEXT /* Type of energy (e.g., oil, natural gas, electricity) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which prices are quoted */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume traded during the day */,
  "trading_value" REAL /* Total value of trades during the day */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Number of outstanding contracts at the start of the trading day */,
  "last_trade_time" TEXT /* Time of the last trade of the day */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Daily volatility of the price */,
  "source_quality" TEXT /* Quality or reliability of the data source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., BBSE3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* How often the data is updated (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last time the data was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key required to access the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., ON NM) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location (if applicable) */,
  "economic_indicator" TEXT /* Economic indicators related to the location (e.g., GDP per capita) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the user account was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
